_info: Copy this file to agent.config.json (which is gitignored) and fill in your values.
_qrz_note: OPTIONAL. Your QRZ Logbook API key (QRZ > your logbook > Settings > API). READ-ONLY: the dashboard only pulls your log, it never writes. When set, QRZ becomes the logbook source (full history + all new contacts, any mode) and the local WSJT-X ADIF is ignored. Leave blank to use the WSJT-X log instead. This file is gitignored, so the key stays on this PC.
